channel.title: Chinese on PCB Isolation
channel.description: Recent content in Chinese on PCB Isolation

item.title: How To Spot a Counterfeit or Refurbished Motorola Razr V3
item.description:
Note - There are many versions of the Motorola Razr, each with subtle differences. Even similar version have differences between countries. Not all of the differences of this counterfeit/refurbished Razr will apply to your Razr!

This applies specifically to the Motorola Razr V3, but you can find similar discrepancies on a Razr V2 or V3i.

If you have a feeling the phone is fake, that’s a good indicator that it is.

item.title: Motorola Razr V3: Real vs Counterfeit Teardown
item.description:
Left- Authentic Razr V3, Right - Counterfeit Razr V3

I recently bought a Razr V3 on eBay. The listing below shows that it is made by Motorola. The pictures are of an authentic Razr. However I received a counterfeit Razr.

PS - I wrote a quick guide on spotting counterfeit Motorola Razr V3’s (without disassembly).

If the phone would have worked, I wouldn’t have cared. But it wouldn’t get a signal with my SIM, so I complained and got a refund.
